Container.Name: Astronomer
Container.Overview: Run Apache Airflow on Unraid using Astronomer Runtime. This template starts Airflow 3 in standalone mode for single-node development/home-lab use. Before first start, create the appdata directory and make it writable by the Airflow runtime user: mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/astronomer/{dags,logs,plugins,config} && chown -R 50000:0 /mnt/user/appdata/astronomer && chmod -R 775 /mnt/user/appdata/astronomer. Airflow 3 uses SimpleAuthManager by default; login passwords are generated and stored at /mnt/user/appdata/astronomer/simple_auth_manager_passwords.json.generated.

Config.Name: Airflow Home
Config.Description: Persist AIRFLOW_HOME, including airflow.cfg, metadata DB, DAGs, logs, plugins, config, and SimpleAuthManager password file. Host path must be writable by UID 50000 and GID 0.

Config.Name: Load Example DAGs
Config.Description: Set to True to load Airflow example DAGs

Config.Name: Simple Auth Users
Config.Description: Airflow 3 SimpleAuthManager users in username:role format. Valid roles include viewer, user, op, and admin. Passwords are generated at first start and stored in /usr/local/airflow/simple_auth_manager_passwords.json.generated.
